title: Double-extraction QA + ≥10% audit + adjudication log
context: Extraction quality is enforced by independent re-extraction of a random sample and a logged adjudication of every discrepancy. This task runs the double-extraction QA and audit across the extracted records. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Run double-extraction QA: independently re-extract ≥10% of records, measure field-level agreement, and adjudicate 100% of discrepancies with logged resolutions.
acceptanceCriteria: ≥10% random sample independently re-extracted; field-level agreement ≥95%.
100% of discrepancies adjudicated with a logged resolution and rationale.
QA report summarizes agreement rates and residual risks for the domain reviewer.
output: /output/qa/extraction-qa-report.md plus an adjudication log, committed to the repo.
